entry.name: icon
entry.label: The name of the icon used in the compact representation (e.g. on a small panel).

entry.name: searchDefaultFilters
entry.label: Runner ids used in the default search.

entry.name: showRecentApps
entry.label: Whether to show the "Recent Applications" category.

entry.name: recentOrdering
entry.label: How should the previously used apps/docs/contacts be ordered: 0 = RecentFirst, 1 = PopularFirst

entry.name: sidebarShortcuts
entry.label: Same as favoriteApps except "xdg:DOCUMENTS", etc are constants to ~/Documents.

entry.name: sidebarCollapsibleSearchResults
entry.label: Whether grouped search results in the sidebar can be collapsed and start with only the first group expanded.

entry.name: customAvatarPath
entry.label: Optional custom avatar image path used only by this plasmoid.

entry.name: useTileTabs
entry.label: Whether to use a tabbed tile grid instead of a single tile area.

entry.name: tileTabStyle
entry.label: Visual style for the tile tab bar.

entry.name: tileIconSize
entry.label: Base icon size (px) used for tiles.

entry.name: tileRoundedCorners
entry.label: Whether shared surfaces use rounded corners.

entry.name: tileCornerRadius
entry.label: Corner radius in logical pixels for shared surfaces and hover highlights.

entry.name: tileHoverEffect
entry.label: Hover effect style for tiles.

entry.name: tileAnimatedPlayOnHover
entry.label: Play animated tile backgrounds only on mouse hover.

entry.name: showTileTooltips
entry.label: Whether tiles show a tooltip with their label on mouse hover.

entry.name: sidebarBackgroundColor
entry.label: Custom colour used by shared surfaces.

entry.name: surfaceStyle
entry.label: Visual treatment used by shared surfaces.

entry.name: sidebarFollowsTheme
entry.label: Whether shared surfaces use the current Plasma style background colour.

entry.name: sidebarHideBorder
entry.label: Remove the shared surface borders for a flat look.

entry.name: presetTilesFolder
entry.label: Custom directory used to store downloaded preset tile images.

entry.name: popupHeight
entry.label: Popup height in logical pixels (scaled in QML via Screen.devicePixelRatio).

entry.name: popupHeightAlphabetical
entry.label: Saved popup height for the Alphabetical view in logical pixels.

entry.name: popupWidthAlphabetical
entry.label: Saved popup width for the Alphabetical view in logical pixels.

entry.name: favGridColsAlphabetical
entry.label: Saved tile grid column count for the Alphabetical view.

entry.name: popupHeightCategories
entry.label: Saved popup height for the Categories view in logical pixels.

entry.name: popupWidthCategories
entry.label: Saved popup width for the Categories view in logical pixels.

entry.name: favGridColsCategories
entry.label: Saved tile grid column count for the Categories view.

entry.name: popupHeightTilesOnly
entry.label: Saved popup height for the Tiles Only view in logical pixels.

entry.name: popupWidthTilesOnly
entry.label: Saved popup width for the Tiles Only view in logical pixels.

entry.name: favGridColsTilesOnly
entry.label: Saved tile grid column count for the Tiles Only view.

entry.name: popupHeightAiChat
entry.label: Saved popup height for the AI Chat view in logical pixels.

entry.name: popupWidthAiChat
entry.label: Saved popup width for the AI Chat view in logical pixels.

entry.name: favGridColsAiChat
entry.label: Saved tile grid column count for the AI Chat view.

entry.name: popupHeightDockedAlphabetical
entry.label: Saved popup height for the Alphabetical view in Docked layout (logical pixels).

entry.name: popupWidthDockedAlphabetical
entry.label: Saved popup width for the Alphabetical view in Docked layout (logical pixels).

entry.name: favGridColsDockedAlphabetical
entry.label: Saved tile grid column count for the Alphabetical view in Docked layout.

entry.name: popupHeightDockedCategories
entry.label: Saved popup height for the Categories view in Docked layout (logical pixels).

entry.name: popupWidthDockedCategories
entry.label: Saved popup width for the Categories view in Docked layout (logical pixels).

entry.name: favGridColsDockedCategories
entry.label: Saved tile grid column count for the Categories view in Docked layout.

entry.name: popupHeightDockedTilesOnly
entry.label: Saved popup height for the Tiles Only view in Docked layout (logical pixels).

entry.name: popupWidthDockedTilesOnly
entry.label: Saved popup width for the Tiles Only view in Docked layout (logical pixels).

entry.name: favGridColsDockedTilesOnly
entry.label: Saved tile grid column count for the Tiles Only view in Docked layout.

entry.name: popupHeightDockedAiChat
entry.label: Saved popup height for the AI Chat view in Docked layout (logical pixels).

entry.name: popupWidthDockedAiChat
entry.label: Saved popup width for the AI Chat view in Docked layout (logical pixels).

entry.name: favGridColsDockedAiChat
entry.label: Saved tile grid column count for the AI Chat view in Docked layout.

entry.name: sidebarPosition
entry.label: Position of the sidebar: left, top, or bottom.

entry.name: useDockedLayout
entry.label: Layout mode: true = Docked Sidebar layout, false = Classic layout.
